title: Adam Back and Michael Saylor Oppose BIP 110 on Bitcoin
content:
Adam Back and Michael Saylor Oppose BIP 110 on Bitcoin
Blockstream co-founder and Hashcash inventor Adam Back and Strategy founder Michael Saylor both opposed implementing BIP 110 on the Bitcoin network. Back said BIP 110 attempts to police other people’s transactions and conflicts with Bitcoin’s principles of decentralization and permissionlessness, warning that pushing it forward would only lead to a fork. Saylor said BIP 110 turns a spam dispute into a consensus change that would invalidate some currently valid, fee-paying transactions. He argued that such a precedent is highly dangerous and that the community should focus on more fundamental threats. —

title: Ripple CEO Says Company Considered Shutting Down After 2020 SEC Lawsuit
content:
Ripple CEO Says Company Considered Shutting Down After 2020 SEC Lawsuit
Ripple CEO Brad Garlinghouse said the company seriously considered shutting down after the U.S. SEC sued it in 2020. He said Ripple could have distributed its XRP holdings to shareholders and told the SEC it no longer held XRP, but chose to keep fighting the lawsuit to avoid hundreds of job losses. —

content:

title: Top 5 South Korean Exchanges' Volume Falls for Five Straight Weeks, Below KRW 10 Trillion
content:
Top 5 South Korean Exchanges' Volume Falls for Five Straight Weeks, Below KRW 10 Trillion
According to Digital Asset, the weekly trading volume of South Korea’s top five fiat-market crypto exchanges (Upbit, Bithumb, Coinone, Korbit, and Gopax) has fallen for five consecutive weeks, dropping below the 10 trillion KRW mark. Data shows that the total trading volume for the week of July 3–10 was ~9.9676 trillion KRW, a 25.75% decrease from the previous week (approx. 13.4 trillion KRW) and a 43.5% decline from early June (17.7 trillion KRW). This marks the first time the weekly trading volume has fallen below 10 trillion KRW in about 2 years and 9 months, since late September 2023. —

title: Just In: Hedera’s largest lending protocol Bonzo loses $9M in oracle exploit
content:
Just In: Hedera’s largest lending protocol Bonzo loses $9M in oracle exploit
Hedera-based lending protocol Bonzo Lend disclosed that it lost approximately $9.05 million in an oracle exploit. Bonzo said a flaw in Supra’s signature verification allowed an attacker to manipulate SAUCE prices and borrow assets far exceeding posted collateral. The protocol has since been paused. Bonzo Labs and the Bonzo Finance Foundation coordinate on recovery and remediation efforts. —

Highlight Clip Former Meta Engineer: Quantum Computing and Miners Are Bitcoin’s Two Ticking Time Bombs
Former Meta Engineer: Quantum Computing and Miners Are Bitcoin’s Two Ticking Time Bombs
A former Meta engineer says Bitcoin faces two ticking time bombs that have yet to be defused: quantum computing and the future of miner incentives. Quantum advances could one day threaten Bitcoin wallet security, while the lack of a sustainable fee market raises questions about long-term network security as mining rewards decline.
He also challenges Bitcoin’s vision as a sovereign currency, arguing that governments are unlikely to tolerate a monetary system beyond their control. —

title: Sky Protocol's Annualized Gross Revenue Run Rate Hits Record $419M
content:
Sky Protocol's Annualized Gross Revenue Run Rate Hits Record $419M
Sky Frontier Foundation said in its June 2026 financial and operational update that Sky Protocol's annualized gross revenue run rate reached a record $419.08 million, based on the last three Monthly Settlement Cycles. Cumulative yield accrued to sUSDS holders through the Sky Savings Rate has surpassed $250 million since inception, while Sky Reserves closed June at $82.5 million, up $33.7 million since March. Grove, one of Sky's Prime Agents, launched its GROVE governance token in June. Separately, a fixed-yield product for sUSDS introduced through Sky.Money and Pendle Finance reached $44.1 million in TVL during its first month. —

content: 퍼미션리스(공개형) 블록체인은 중앙 중개자에 대한 의존을 줄이겠다는 약속에서 출발했다. 그러나 국제결제은행(BIS)이 7월 6일 발표한 불리틴 126호는 정반대의 현실을 지적한다. 비트코인과 이더리움 이후 분산원장(DLT) 위의 활동은 결제·디파이·디지털자산 시장으로 빠르게 확장됐지만, 확장 가능한 단일 인프라로 수렴하는 대신 수많은 네트워크로 쪼개져 유동성을 분산시키고 네트워크 효과를 희석시켰다는 것이다. 보고서는 이 분열이 기술적 우연이 아니라 합의 메커니즘에 내재한 경제적 트레이드오프의 결과라고 진단했다. 합의는 토큰 인센티브 균형이다 블록체인은 서로 알지도 신뢰하지도 않는...  더보기

title: [토큰분석] 효율의 이면, 토큰화가 만든 다섯 갈래 리스크
content: 토큰화는 일부 마찰을 줄이는 동시에 새로운 위험을 만든다. IMF 보고서는 효율 서사에 가려지기 쉬운 리스크 지형을 라이프사이클 단계별로 정리한다. 그리고 이 위험들은 대체로 아키텍처 선택에 따라 크기가 달라진다. 브리지·오케스트레이터·오라클이 개입할수록 취약점이 늘어난다. ① 스마트컨트랙트라는 공격 벡터 토큰의 안전성은 블록체인 프로토콜만으로 보장되지 않는다. 토큰 컨트랙트에 삽입된 커스텀 함수블랙리스트, 자동 이자 지급, 투표 기능 등는 유연성을 주지만, 악의적 발행자가 잔액을 조작하거나 배분을 변경할 여지도 만든다. 보고서는 발행(minting) 권한을 멀티시그(예: 2-of-3, 4-of-7)와 타임락, 발행...  더보기
reason: 토큰화와 스마트 컨트랙트의 안전성, 위험성에 대한 분석이 담겨 있어 암호화폐 전문 방송 채널의 시청자에게 중요하고 흥미로운 내용입니다.

title: [토큰분석] 토큰화 세계의 세 갈래 길… 단일·공통·호환 원장이 가르는 ‘원자적 결제’의 운명
content: 토큰화의 효율은 기술만으로 결정되지 않는다. IMF 보고서는 원장(ledger)·자산·소유자 사이의 관계, 즉 아키텍처가 거래의 효율과 리스크를 좌우한다고 강조한다. 자산이 같은 원장에 기록되는지, 그리고 소유자가 그 원장에 접근할 수 있는지  이 두 축의 조합에서 세 가지 모델이 도출된다. 단일 원장  강한 원자성, 그러나 아직 존재하지 않는 이상 단일 원장(single ledger) 모델은 거래되는 모든 자산이 하나의 원장에 기록되고 모든 소유자가 여기에 접근한다. 이 구조에서만 엄격한 원자성(strict atomicity)과 완전한 컴포저빌리티가 성립하며, 사전예치(prefunding) 없이 원자적 DvP·DvD·PvP가 가능하다....  더보기

title: Cambridge Report: Ethereum’s Annual Power Use Falls to 7.87 GWh After The Merge
content:
Cambridge Report: Ethereum’s Annual Power Use Falls to 7.87 GWh After The Merge
According to a new report from the Cambridge Centre for Alternative Finance (CCAF), Ethereum consumes approximately 7.87 GWh of electricity annually following The Merge, a decline of more than 99.9% from its pre-Merge level. The report estimates annual emissions at around 2.37 ktCO₂e, down roughly 99.98%, based on an infrastructure audit of approximately 8,522 nodes. It also finds that the United States, Germany, Finland, and France host about 62% of Ethereum full nodes, while Hetzner, Amazon Web Services, and OVH together host roughly 40% of all nodes. In addition, 56.4% of the network’s electricity is supplied by sustainable energy sources, with the report concluding that Ethereum’s environmental footprint is now driven primarily by the carbon intensity of local power grids rather than its consensus mechanism. —

title: XRP 소폭 상승세, 거래소 공급량 7년 최저 수준
content: XRP 현재 가격, 1.1032달러…소폭 반등세코인마켓캡 최신 데이터에 따르면 XRP는 2026년 7월 10일 오후 9시 5분(UTC) 기준 1.1032달러에 거래되고 있다. 24시간 등락률은 +0.59%로 소폭 상승했으며, 같은 기간 거래량은 약 11억 460만 달러를 기록했다. 구글 파이낸스 역시 XRP를 1.1004달러로 집계하며 상승 흐름을 확인했다.반면 주간 및 중장기 성과는 부진하다. 7일 수익률은 -3.04%, 60일 수익률은 -25.13%, 90일 수익률은 -18.98%로 집계됐다. 30일 수익률만 +0.59%로 겨우 보합권을 회복한 수준이다. 시가총액은 689억 달러로 전체 암호화폐 시장 내 점유율은 3.15%를 기록 중이다.거래소 공급량 7년 최저…매도 압력 완화 신호XRP를...  더보기

title: 솔라나(SOL), 약세 속 문페이 결제 확대로 시장 성장 기대
content: 솔라나(SOL) 가격이 76~77달러 사이에서 거래되면서 약세를 보이고 있다. 현재 시가총액은 약 480억 달러이다.시장 지표와 투자 심리 급락솔라나에 대한 부정적 감정이 2026년에 들어 가장 높은 수준에 이르렀고, 거래량은 올해 최저 수준으로 떨어졌다. 온체인 분석에 따르면 이러한 '극단적 비관론과 저거래량'의 조합은 과거 가격 반등의 신호가 된 경우도 있으나, 반드시 가격 상승을 보장하지는 않는다.문페이 결제 확대와 모포 DeFi 통합문페이는 솔라나의 결제 기능을 확대하고 있으며, 모포($MORPHO)는 선라이즈를 통해 솔라나에서 성공적으로 론칭했다. 또한, 생태계 업데이트에는 기관급 인프라 개발도 포함되었다.개발자 커뮤니티와...  더보기

title: [토큰명언] "꼬리 사건이 모든 것을 결정한다" ㅡ Day 116
content:
본 콘텐츠는 특정 종목이나 자산에 대한 투자 조언이 아니며, 변동성 높은 시장에서 흔들리지 않는 투자 마인드를 가꾸기 위한 심리적 환기 목적으로 제공됩니다. 성공적인 투자를 기원합니다. [편집자주]

title: South Korea's largest automaker completes pilot USDT stablecoin transfer on Avalanche
content:
South Korea's largest automaker completes pilot USDT stablecoin transfer on Avalanche
Hyundai Motor, South Korea's largest automaker, became the country’s first major company to use blockchain for real-time internal cross-border treasury transfers. The company completed a $20,000 USDT stablecoin pilot from its U.S. entity to its Mexico entity on Avalanche, cutting settlement time from several hours through traditional banking rails to about seven minutes. Hyundai plans to expand the mechanism to more countries and local currencies, and will launch a second pilot for its European subsidiaries later this month with Circle and Visa. — 
link

title: Bitcoin Treasury Firm Empery Digital Sold 1,400 BTC for $87.1M to Repay Debt, Fund Property Acquisition and Legal Expens
content:
Bitcoin Treasury Firm Empery Digital Sold 1,400 BTC for $87.1M to Repay Debt, Fund Property Acquisition and Legal Expenses
Nasdaq-listed Empery Digital disclosed in an SEC filing that it sold 1,400 BTC since May at an average price of $62,200, generating approximately $87.1 million in proceeds. The funds will be used to repay debt, support a previously announced property acquisition and cover legal expenses.
The company has recently shifted its strategic focus toward AI infrastructure, including participation in a proposed $1 billion AI data center project alongside members of the Hunt and Crow families. Empery also announced it would discontinue public NAV disclosures based solely on bitcoin holdings, citing growing exposure to AI and energy infrastructure businesses. —

title: Circle Wins Approval to Establish U.S. National Trust Bank, Shares Jump Over 7.7% Premarket
content:
Circle Wins Approval to Establish U.S. National Trust Bank, Shares Jump Over 7.7% Premarket
Circle shares rose more than 7.7% in pre-market trading after the company said it received final approval from the U.S. Office of the Comptroller of the Currency (OCC) to establish First National Digital Currency Bank, N.A., which will operate as Circle National Trust. Once launched, the bank will initially provide fiduciary digital asset custody services to Circle and its affiliates. —

title: Ethereum Foundation's Protocol Support Team Disbanded
content:
Ethereum Foundation's Protocol Support Team Disbanded
EF Protocol Support said the Ethereum Foundation's Protocol Support team has been disbanded. The team coordinated Ethereum's protocol development process, including core developer meetings, network upgrade tracking, EIP support, the Ethereum Protocol Fellowship program, and related education, community, and infrastructure efforts. The move comes amid broader organizational restructuring and recent team and personnel changes at the foundation. —

title: 7월 10일 퇴근길 팟캐스트 — 4시간 숏 청산 1962만달러 집중…비트코인 점유율 상승 속 ETF 동반 유출

reason: 암호화폐 시장에서 1962만달러 규모의 포지션이 청산되고, 숏 포지션에 집중된 점이 주목된다.

title: [저녁 뉴스브리핑] 비트코인·이더리움 옵션 19억700만달러 오늘 만기 外

Highlight Clip Michael Saylor: Even if Bitcoin's Annualized Return Is 0%, MSTR Could Last 40–50 Years
Michael Saylor: Even if Bitcoin's Annualized Return Is 0%, MSTR Could Last 40–50 Years
Strategy founder Michael Saylor said in a June 30 interview with NewEraFinancePodcast that even if Bitcoin delivers a 0% annualized return for the next 40 years, MSTR would still have about 30–40 years of interest coverage without making any adjustments.
With refinancing or other actions, he said the company could potentially last 40–50 years. Saylor added that MSTR does not need Bitcoin to rise 30% a year; at around 3% annual appreciation, it could pay interest indefinitely without selling common stock. —

title: Bitwise: Crypto Posts Third Straight Quarter of Negative Returns, Longest Streak Since 2022
content:
Bitwise: Crypto Posts Third Straight Quarter of Negative Returns, Longest Streak Since 2022
Bitwise said the Bitwise 10 Large Cap Crypto Index fell 15.4% in Q2, with eight of its 10 constituents declining, while spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded their worst quarter of outflows on record. However, prediction market volume hit a record $43.2 billion, tokenized real-world assets rose 50.3% year to date to $32.89 billion, and stablecoin settlement volume reached 2.3 times that of Visa. Bitwise noted that crypto has now posted three consecutive quarters of negative returns, the longest streak since 2022, even as Ethereum transaction activity is about 13 times higher, DeFi TVL is up more than 60%, and stablecoin AUM has roughly doubled from the 2022 bear-market bottom. —

title: HIghlight Clip Former Meta Engineer Explains Why He Sold All His Bitcoin
content:
HIghlight Clip Former Meta Engineer Explains Why He Sold All His Bitcoin
Former Meta Engineer Explains Why He Sold All His Bitcoin
Former Meta engineer has resurfaced after a period of silence, admitting he has liquidated his entire Bitcoin position. He argues that Bitcoin's core problem is that "attention is liquidity" — the NFT bubble proved that holding alone can't sustain a price, and the people who used to talk about Bitcoin have largely gone quiet.
He believes AI has now absorbed nearly all of the market's attention, leaving little room for a fresh wave of buying anytime soon.Still, he says he remains bullish long-term and plans to buy back in at a lower price. —

title: Binance CEO: 70% of EU User Withdrawals Moved to Self-Custodied Wallets After MiCA Exit
content:
Binance CEO: 70% of EU User Withdrawals Moved to Self-Custodied Wallets After MiCA Exit
Binance CEO Richard Teng said that following the exchange’s suspension of services in the European Union due to MiCA licensing issues, around 70% of funds withdrawn by EU users were transferred to self-custodied wallets, while only 30% moved to MiCA-compliant regulated platforms. Teng argued that the migration toward self-custody raises questions about whether MiCA is achieving its intended consumer protection goals, as self-hosted wallets operate outside the oversight applied to licensed exchanges. He added that several EU jurisdictions have invited Binance to apply for local licenses, while the company continues to expand its presence in Asia. —

title: Polymarket Seeks License to Offer Margin Trading Legally in US
content:
Polymarket Seeks License to Offer Margin Trading Legally in US
According to Bloomberg, Polymarket, the world’s largest prediction market platform, is seeking US regulatory approval to offer margin trading, allowing users to open positions without posting the full amount of capital upfront. On July 3, Polymarket applied through its affiliate Coming Home GBA LLC for a futures commission merchant license with the National Futures Association. It must also obtain CFTC approval to amend its rulebook to permit non-fully collateralized trading. US rules would require users of prediction market margin products to undergo additional identity checks, including providing employer information. — 
link
reason: Polymarket이 미국에서 마진 트레이딩을 법적으로 제공하기 위해 라이센스를 신청하는 뉴스입니다.

title: Hyperliquid Policy Center and Phantom Urge CFTC to Clarify That Publishing Onchain Protocol Software Does Not Require Re
content:
Hyperliquid Policy Center and Phantom Urge CFTC to Clarify That Publishing Onchain Protocol Software Does Not Require Registration
Hyperliquid Policy Center (HPC) and Phantom submitted a joint comment letter to the CFTC, urging the agency to modernize its regulatory framework for onchain market infrastructure. The letter calls for clarifying that publishing onchain protocol software alone does not require registration, creating a clear pathway for regulated exchanges and clearinghouses to adopt onchain infrastructure, and codifying the Phantom non-action letter into a formal rule. It argues that the current regulatory framework was designed for traditional custodial intermediaries and should be updated to reflect the self-custodial and transparent nature of onchain markets. —

title: Bitwise 10 Crypto Index ETF (BITW) Adds HYPE, Removes DOT and AVAX
content:
Bitwise 10 Crypto Index ETF (BITW) Adds HYPE, Removes DOT and AVAX
Bitwise has officially added Hyperliquid (HYPE) to the Bitwise 10 Crypto Index ETF (BITW), the world's largest crypto index fund. Hyperliquid posted strong performance in the first half of 2026, recording $1.34 trillion in trading volume, $320 million in revenue, and a 165% year-to-date gain for HYPE. Following the rebalance, HYPE carries an approximate 0.95% weighting in the fund. As part of the index reconstitution based on constituent weight optimization and market capitalization rankings, Stellar (XLM) was also added, while Polkadot (DOT) and Avalanche (AVAX) were removed from BITW. —

According to CNBC, Temasek Chief Investment Officer Nagi Hamiyeh said the Singapore sovereign wealth fund still has no plans to invest directly in cryptocurrencies after recognizing an approximately $275 million impairment on its FTX investment in 2022. “We have no direct crypto investments,” Hamiyeh said, adding that regulatory uncertainty means crypto remains “outside our investment scope.” Temasek will, however, continue to monitor blockchain and related infrastructure applications in the real economy. — 
link
reason: FTX와 Temasek의 직접적인 암호화폐 투자에 대한 내용과 규제 불확실성에 대한 언급

title: ICIJ: Circle Faces Criminal Complaint in Wisconsin Over Refusal to Recover Scam Victim Funds
content:
ICIJ: Circle Faces Criminal Complaint in Wisconsin Over Refusal to Recover Scam Victim Funds
An ICIJ investigation reported that law enforcement authorities in Wisconsin and New York accused Circle of refusing to assist in freezing or recovering scam victims’ USDC. Wisconsin prosecutors have filed a criminal complaint against Circle, alleging the company failed to comply with a court order to recover stolen assets. Circle called the complaint meritless, arguing it lacked the technical ability to comply and that the court lacked jurisdiction. — 
link
reason: Circle은 USDC와 관련된 사기 피해자 자산 회수와 관련된 법적 논란이기 때문에 암호화폐와 관련이 있습니다.

title: [현장] AI가 생성하고 양자가 흔드는 시대…블록체인은 무엇을 증명해야 하나
content: 서울 강남 드림플러스에서 열린 심버스 데이 2026를 다녀왔다. 행사장을 나오며 가장 오래 남은 것은 새로운 메인넷도, 새로운 지갑도 아니었다. 신뢰(Trust)였다. 최근 블록체인 업계는 AI와의 결합을 경쟁적으로 이야기한다. AI 에이전트, 실물자산 토큰화(RWA), 스테이블코인, 디지털 자산…. 새로운 서비스는 계속 등장하고 있지만, 이번 심버스 데이가 던진 질문은 조금 달랐다. AI가 모든 것을 만들어내는 시대에도 우리는 무엇을 믿을 것인가. 이번 발표에서 인상 깊었던 점은 새로운 기능을 소개하는 데 있지 않았다. 발표의 중심에는 양자 시대에도 블록체인의 신뢰를 어떻게 유지할 것인가라는 문제의식이 있었다.   기술보다...  더보기
reason: 블록체인과 신뢰, 양자 시대에 블록체인의 신뢰 유지 방법에 대한 문제의식이 언급되어 있어 크립토 관련성이 높고 시청자에게 흥미로운 주제입니다.

title: 이더리움, UTXO 논쟁 재점화 속 1700달러 방어…1830달러 돌파가 분기점
content: 이더리움(ETH) 가격이 생태계 내 논쟁 재점화 속에 하락 압력을 받으며 1,700달러선 방어 국면에 진입했다. 기술 제안과 경쟁 프로젝트 간 갈등이 다시 부각되면서 시장 변동성이 확대되는 모습이다.UTXO 도입 제안에 불붙은 논쟁최근 이더리움 연구원 토니 바르슈테터(Toni Wahrstätter)는 이더리움에 ‘UTXO 방식 결제’를 도입하는 방안을 제안했다. 해당 설계는 사용된 거래에 대한 최소한의 표시만 남기고, 대부분의 결제 데이터를 블록체인 히스토리에 보관하는 구조다. 이를 통해 네트워크의 영구 저장 부담을 최대 99.8%까지 줄일 수 있다는 설명이다.이 제안은 곧바로 에이다(ADA) 창립자 찰스 호스킨슨(Charles Hoskinson)의 반발을...  더보기
reason: 이더리움 가격과 UTXO 논쟁에 대한 내용이 포함되어 있어 크립토 관련 뉴스입니다.

reason: 비트코인 가격에 영향을 미치는 중동 리스크와 미국 금리 정책에 대한 내용이 포함되어 있어 암호화폐 전문 방송 채널의 뉴스 소재로서 중요합니다.

title: Sony Bank gets US regulator nod to issue stablecoins

title: Interpol operation exposes $122M crypto wallet tied to romance scam laundering
